text:
Your gut makes most of your decisions.

Daniel Kahneman won a Nobel proving how often it's confidently wrong.

I turned his bias research into a Skill that audits the thinking behind any call before I trust it.

Here's the build prompt so you can make your own: https://t.co/Fm1zS7ySj2

use /skill-creator to build the following skill:

Name: kahneman-bias-audit
Trigger: Manual only. Run this skill when I call it by name. Do not auto-activate based on the topic of conversation.

What it does:
Takes a judgment I've made or am about to make and audits the thinking

Skill-creator builds two files. The skill, and kahneman-biases. md, the checklist it reads from.

After that you stop trusting confident gut calls on reflex. You type:

/kahneman-bias-audit

Feed it a judgment and you get back which mental system made it, the biases bending it,

if you found this useful, also check this out.

Install real expertise, not just prompts.

Get my Claude skills bundle 👇
